DEMO_ID_SQNC_NUM 
LABEL: 
Demonstration sequence number 
DESCRIPTION: The number of demonstration identification trailers present on the claim. 
SHORT NAME: DEMO_ID_SQNC_NUM 
LONG NAME: DEMO_ID_SQNC_NUM 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
CCW 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
The demonstration sequence number is a sequential line number to distinguish distinct demonstration 
projects
